parts.label: Rear Brake Rotor — Left (299mm)
parts.function: Vented cast iron disc that provides the friction surface for rear brake pad clamping to generate stopping force.

parts.label: Rear Brake Rotor — Right (299mm)
parts.function: Vented cast iron disc that provides the friction surface for rear brake pad clamping to generate stopping force.

parts.label: Rear Brake Caliper — Left (4-piston with EPB)
parts.function: Fixed 4-piston caliper that clamps brake pads against the rotor and houses the integrated electronic parking brake motor-in-caliper actuator.

parts.label: Rear Brake Caliper — Right (4-piston with EPB)
parts.function: Fixed 4-piston caliper that clamps brake pads against the rotor and houses the integrated electronic parking brake motor-in-caliper actuator.

parts.label: Rear Brake Pads
parts.function: Friction material pads that press against the rear rotors under hydraulic caliper clamping force to decelerate the vehicle.

parts.label: EPB Actuator — Left
parts.function: Motor-in-caliper electric actuator that mechanically clamps the rear caliper pistons to hold the vehicle stationary when the electronic parking brake is engaged.

parts.label: EPB Actuator — Right
parts.function: Motor-in-caliper electric actuator that mechanically clamps the rear caliper pistons to hold the vehicle stationary when the electronic parking brake is engaged.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Rear Left
parts.function: Active Hall-effect sensor that reads the ABS tone ring to report rear-left wheel rotational speed to the ABS/PSM control unit.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Rear Right
parts.function: Active Hall-effect sensor that reads the ABS tone ring to report rear-right wheel rotational speed to the ABS/PSM control unit.

parts.label: ABS / PSM Hydraulic Control Unit
parts.function: Bosch integrated ABS and Porsche Stability Management hydraulic modulator that independently regulates brake pressure at each wheel during ABS, traction control, and stability events.

parts.label: Brake Lines (Hard & Stainless Braided Flex)
parts.function: Hard steel lines and stainless braided flexible hoses that route hydraulic brake fluid from the master cylinder through the ABS unit to each caliper.

parts.label: Brake Fluid Reservoir
parts.function: Translucent reservoir mounted on the brake master cylinder that stores and supplies DOT brake fluid to maintain system pressure and compensate for pad wear.

parts.label: Brake Master Cylinder
parts.function: Converts pedal force into hydraulic pressure that is transmitted through the brake lines to actuate all four calipers for braking.

parts.label: Brake Servo (Vacuum Booster)
parts.function: Vacuum-assisted booster mounted between the brake pedal and master cylinder that multiplies driver pedal force to reduce braking effort.

parts.label: Rear Brake Disc Cover Plate — Left
parts.function: Sheet metal splash shield mounted behind the rear rotor that deflects road debris and water away from the rotor and caliper.

parts.label: Rear Brake Disc Cover Plate — Right
parts.function: Sheet metal splash shield mounted behind the rear rotor that deflects road debris and water away from the rotor and caliper.

parts.label: Rear Caliper Seal Repair Set
parts.function: Piston seal and dust boot repair kit for the rear brake calipers, used when rebuilding calipers to restore hydraulic sealing and prevent fluid leaks.

parts.label: Brake Fluid (DOT)
parts.function: Hygroscopic hydraulic fluid that fills the brake system and transmits pedal force to the calipers; requires periodic replacement as it absorbs moisture and its boiling point degrades.

parts.label: Rear Brake Hose
parts.function: Flexible rubber hose that bridges the fixed hard brake line to the rear caliper, accommodating suspension movement while maintaining hydraulic pressure.

parts.label: Brake Pad Wear Sender Wire — Rear
parts.function: Electrical lead connecting the rear brake pad wear sensor to the vehicle wiring harness, triggering a dashboard warning when pad material reaches minimum thickness.
